response.justification: This is an excellent senior software engineer, but the role requires specialized hardware expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator optimization. The candidate's entire background is software development with no hardware design experience, making this a fundamental domain mismatch. While they meet the educational requirement (Bachelor's + 8+ years), they lack every core technical competency the role demands.
strengths: Principal/staff-level software engineering credentials with proven track record at Google, Meta, and other top companies
Current role involves AI infrastructure and developer tooling, showing recent exposure to AI systems
Demonstrated ability to optimize complex systems and work across multiple technical domains
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling experience—the foundational technical requirement for this role
Career is entirely software-focused with zero hardware design, chip simulation, or GPU architecture background
Missing expertise in deep-learning workload optimization specific to AI accelerators and neural network inference/training
